name: Borosil Renewables Limited
summary: Borosil Renewables Limited engages in the manufacture and sale of flat glass products in India and internationally. It provides clear patterned glass and low iron solar glass for various applications in photovoltaic panels, flat plate collectors, and green houses. The company was formerly known as Borosil Glass Works Limited and changed its name to Borosil Renewables Limited in February 2020. Borosil Renewables Limited was incorporated in 1962 and is based in Mumbai, India.
